about.title: About
about.story_p1: I build AI-powered products for global users — from tool sites to info hubs and game platforms. Starting from scratch, I believe that AI has lowered the barrier to building great products more than ever before.
about.story_p2: This site documents my journey: what I build, how I build it, and what I learn along the way.
about.stack_dev_desc: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Python, Claude, Cursor
about.stack_ai_desc: LLM APIs, RAG, prompt engineering, agent workflows
about.stack_ops_desc: Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, SEO, analytics, content marketing
about.philosophy_quote: The best time to start building was yesterday. The second best time is now.
